# AGENTS.md — Awesome Lint Extra

## Project Overview

Custom linter for awesome lists with badge validation, custom tags, and format checks.

- **Repo:** [GeiserX/awesome-lint-extra](https://github.com/GeiserX/awesome-lint-extra)
